input.command:
git add modules/common/workstation.nix && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add GDK_DPI_SCALE to session variables for GTK font scaling

Set GDK_DPI_SCALE=1.15 to scale up font rendering in GTK apps
(Chrome, Emacs) without affecting Kitty terminal.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Add GDK_DPI_SCALE for GTK font scaling" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Add `GDK_DPI_SCALE = "1.15"` to `environment.sessionVariables` in workstation.nix
- Scales up font rendering in GTK apps (Chrome, Emacs) without affecting Kitty terminal

## Test plan
- [ ] Rebuild NixOS config and verify GTK apps render fonts at the larger scale
- [ ] Verify Kitty terminal is unaffected

Run: 20260319-0822-e27c
EOF
)"
